bead.title: website: create /features/ section with one page per core capability and maturity badges
bead.description: Create /features/ as a single landing page with named anchors for each capability. Audit and remove any Persona System listing from the existing features page. Sections: Artifact Graph (lead), Beads & DAG, Execute-Loop (ddx work), Evidence Capture, Multi-Model Review, Skills, Agent-Agnostic Dispatch. Artifact graph framing: documents and non-markdown files (graphics, diagrams) tracked via .ddx.yaml sidecar — impact analysis and drift visibility, not just navigation. No HELIX methodology concepts. Each section: maturity badge + screenshot placeholder + prose. Split to individual pages only if later depth justifies it.
bead.acceptance: /features/ is a single page with anchors; existing Persona System listing removed; artifact graph section leads with drift detection and impact analysis framing; all sections have maturity badges; screenshots linked from website/static/ui/ once generated
